info.name: PetEase - Unit Testing Collection
info.description:
Complete Unit Testing Collection for the PetEase MERN Stack Application.

This collection covers all 24 unit test cases (UT01-UT24) documented in the Testing & Analysis chapter.

**HOW TO USE:**
1. Run UT01 first to register a user.
2. Run UT03 to verify OTP (check email/console for code).
3. Run UT02 to login and copy the token.
4. Paste the token into the collection variable `userToken`.
5. For admin tests, login as admin (UT22) and copy admin token to `adminToken`.
6. For doctor tests, register doctor (UT19), verify OTP (UT20), get admin approval (UT23), then login (UT24).

Base URL: http://localhost:5000

item.name: 1. Auth Module
item.description: Authentication related test cases: Registration, Login, OTP, and Profile.

request.description:
**UT01 - Auth Registration**

Registers a new user account. On success returns 201 and sends an OTP to the provided email.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/auth/register
3. Body > raw > JSON
4. No Authorization needed
5. Click Send

**Expected:** 201 Created with message 'Registration successful'

**UT03 - OTP Verification**

Verifies the OTP sent to the user's email during registration.

**Steps:**
1. Check your email inbox or backend console for the 6-digit OTP code
2. Replace "123456" in the body with the actual OTP
3. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with 'Email verified successfully' and a JWT token

**UT02 - User Login**

Logs in a verified user and returns a JWT Bearer token.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/auth/login
3. Body > raw > JSON with email and password
4. No Authorization needed
5. Click Send
6. IMPORTANT: Copy the 'token' value from the response
7. Go to Collection Variables and paste it into 'userToken'

**Expected:** 200 OK with token and user object

**UT04 - Get Profile**

Fetches the authenticated user's profile using JWT token.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to GET
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/auth/me
3. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > paste your token (or use {{userToken}} variable)
4. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with user data (id, fullName, email, role, points)

item.name: 2. Doctors Module
item.description: Doctor search, consultations, prescriptions.

request.description:
**UT05 - Doctor Search**

Searches and lists veterinarians filtered by specialization.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to GET
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/doctors?specialization=Surgeon
3. No Authorization needed (public route)
4. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with paginated array of doctor objects matching the specialization filter

**UT06 - Book Consultation**

Books a vet consultation appointment for the authenticated user.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/doctors/consultations
3. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{userToken}}
4. Body > raw > JSON with doctorId and appointmentDate
5. Click Send

**Expected:** 201 Created with consultation data showing PENDING_PAYMENT status

**UT07 - Update Consultation Status**

Updates the status of a specific consultation (Doctor or Admin action).

**Steps:**
1. Set method to PATCH (not PUT!)
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/doctors/consultations/1/status
3. Replace '1' with the actual consultation ID
4. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{doctorToken}} or {{adminToken}}
5. Body > raw > JSON with status value
6. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with updated consultation object

**UT08 - Create Prescription**

Doctor issues a prescription for a specific consultation.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/doctors/prescriptions
3. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{doctorToken}}
4. Body > raw > JSON with consultationId, medications array, instructions
5. Click Send

**Expected:** 201 Created with prescription data attached to the consultation

item.name: 3. Events Module
item.description: Event listing and registration.

request.description:
**[SETUP] Create Test Event**

Run this FIRST to seed a real event so UT09 returns data instead of empty array.

**Steps:**
1. Make sure {{adminToken}} is set (run UT22 first)
2. Set method to POST
3. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/events
4. Authorization: Bearer {{adminToken}}
5. Click Send
6. Copy the event 'id' from response for use in UT10

**Expected:** 201 Created with the new event object

**UT09 - Fetch Upcoming Events**

Retrieves list of public upcoming vaccination/health events.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to GET
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/events?upcoming=true
3. No Authorization needed (public route)
4. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with filtered array of upcoming events

**UT10 - Register for Event**

Registers the authenticated user for a specific event.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/events/register
3. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{userToken}}
4. Body > raw > JSON with eventId and numberOfGuests
5. Click Send

**Expected:** 201 Created with registration object containing event details

item.name: 4. Campaigns Module
item.description: Campaign viewing and eSewa donation initiation.

request.description:
**UT11 - View Campaign**

Retrieves details of a specific fund donation campaign.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to GET
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/campaigns/1
3. Replace '1' with actual campaign ID
4. No Authorization needed (public route)
5. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with campaign goal, current amounts, and status

**UT12 - Initiate eSewa Donation**

Initiates an eSewa payment flow for donating to a campaign.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/campaigns/1/donate
3. Replace '1' with actual campaign ID
4. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{userToken}}
5. Body > raw > JSON with amount (minimum Rs. 10)
6. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with eSewa payload containing signature hash and redirect URL

item.name: 5. Chat Module
item.description: Chat session initiation for adoption.

request.description:
**UT13 - Initiate Chat Session**

Initializes a chat room for adoption discussion about a specific pet.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/chat/initiate
3. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{userToken}}
4. Body > raw > JSON with petId
5. Replace '15' with an actual pet ID from your database
6. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with chatId, adoptionRequestId, and petId

item.name: 6. Store & Orders Module
item.description: E-Commerce checkout processing.

request.description:
**UT14 - E-Commerce Checkout**

Processes a cart into an order with the specified payment method.

**Steps:**
1. PREREQUISITE: Add items to cart first using POST /api/cart/add
2. Set method to POST
3. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/orders/checkout
4. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{userToken}}
5. Body > raw > JSON with paymentMethod ('COD' or 'ESEWA')
6. Click Send

**Expected:** 201 Created with order ID and cart cleared

item.name: 7. Admin Module
item.description: Admin dashboard stats and user management.

request.description:
**UT15 - Admin Dashboard Stats**

Retrieves aggregated system statistics for the admin dashboard.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to GET
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/admin/dashboard-stats
3. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{adminToken}}
4. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with total users, revenues, and task aggregates

item.name: 8. Users Module
item.description: User public profile retrieval.

request.description:
**UT16 - Get User Profile Stats**

Retrieves a user's public profile with donated and adopted stats.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to GET
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/users/2/public-profile
3. Replace '2' with the actual user ID
4. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{userToken}}
5. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with user profile containing donated and adopted statistics

item.name: 9. Pets Module
item.description: Pet listing creation.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Buddy",
    "breed": "Golden Retriever",
    "type": "Dog",
    "age": 2,
    "gender": "Male",
    "description": "Friendly and playful golden retriever looking for a home"
}

request.description:
**UT17 - Create Pet Listing**

Creates a new pet listing on the adoption board.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/pets
3. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{userToken}}
4. Body > raw > JSON with pet details
5. Click Send

**Expected:** 201 Created with pet data including ownerId mapped to authenticated user

item.name: 10. Adoption Module
item.description: Adoption form submission.

request.description:
**UT18 - Adoption Form Submission**

Submits an adoption application for a specific pet.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/adoptions
3. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{userToken}}
4. Body > raw > JSON with petId and reason
5. Replace '12' with an actual pet ID
6. Click Send

**Expected:** 201 Created with adoption request in 'PENDING' status linked to the pet

item.name: 11. Doctor Registration & Admin Approval Flow
item.description: Complete doctor onboarding lifecycle: Register → OTP → Blocked Login → Admin Login → Admin Approve → Approved Login.

request.description:
**UT19 - Doctor Registration & OTP Generation**

Registers a new doctor with certification document uploads.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/doctors/register
3. Body > form-data (NOT raw JSON)
4. Fill in all text fields
5. For licenseDoc, degreeDoc, photo: click 'Select Files' and upload PDFs/images
6. No Authorization needed
7. Click Send

**Expected:** 201 Created with doctor profile in 'PENDING' verification status and OTP sent to email

**UT20 - Doctor OTP Verification**

Verifies the OTP sent to the doctor's email. After this, the doctor's email is verified but they still need Admin approval to login.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/auth/verify-otp
3. Check email/backend console for the OTP code
4. Replace '123456' with the actual OTP
5. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with 'Email verified successfully' - but doctor still cannot login until admin approval

**UT21 - Doctor Login (Unapproved)**

Attempts to login as a doctor BEFORE admin approval. This should be BLOCKED.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/auth/login
3. Body > raw > JSON with doctor email and password
4. No Authorization needed
5. Click Send

**Expected:** 403 Forbidden with 'Account pending admin approval' error message.
This proves the admin gate is working correctly.

**UT22 - Admin Login Authentication**

Authenticates the administrator to receive an elevated admin access token.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/auth/login
3. Body > raw > JSON with admin email and password
4. No Authorization needed
5. Click Send
6. IMPORTANT: Copy the 'token' value from the response
7. Go to Collection Variables and paste it into 'adminToken'

**Expected:** 200 OK with JWT token bound to 'ADMIN' role

**UT23 - Admin Doctor Approval**

Admin approves a pending doctor profile, unlocking their ability to login.

**Steps:**
1. PREREQUISITE: Must have admin token from UT22
2. Set method to PUT
3. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/doctors/admin/approve/1
4. Replace '1' with the actual doctor ID (from UT19 response)
5. Authorization tab > Bearer Token > use {{adminToken}}
6. No body needed
7. Click Send

**Expected:** 200 OK with doctor status changed to 'APPROVED'

**UT24 - Doctor Login (Approved)**

Logs in the doctor AFTER admin approval. This should now SUCCEED.

**Steps:**
1. Set method to POST
2. URL: {{baseUrl}}/api/auth/login
3. Body > raw > JSON with doctor email and password
4. No Authorization needed
5. Click Send
6. IMPORTANT: Copy the 'token' value from the response
7. Go to Collection Variables and paste it into 'doctorToken'

**Expected:** 200 OK with JWT token bound to 'DOCTOR' role.
This confirms the full Registration → OTP → Admin Gate → Login lifecycle works.

item.name: 12. Edge Cases & Negative - Auth Module
item.description: Edge case, negative, and security test cases for the Authentication module (UT25-UT31).

item.name: UT25 - Registration with Missing Required Fields

request.description:
**UT25 - Registration with Missing Required Fields**

Attempts registration with only an email, omitting fullName, password, and phone.

**Test ID:** UT25
**Module Name:** Authentication
**Test Description:** Boundary/Negative — verify server rejects incomplete registration payload
**Input:** POST /api/auth/register — Body: { "email": "missingfields@test.com" }
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "All fields are required" } (or field-level validation errors)
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT26 - Registration with Invalid Email Format

request.description:
**UT26 - Registration with Invalid Email Format**

Sends a malformed email address during registration.

**Test ID:** UT26
**Module Name:** Authentication
**Test Description:** Edge case — invalid email format should be rejected by backend validation
**Input:** POST /api/auth/register — Body: { email: 'not-an-email', ... }
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "Invalid email format" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

**UT27 - Login with Incorrect Password**

Attempts to login with a valid email but wrong password.

**Test ID:** UT27
**Module Name:** Authentication
**Test Description:** Negative — incorrect credentials must return a generic error without exposing whether email exists
**Input:** POST /api/auth/login — Body: { email: 'test@test.com', password: 'WrongPassword999' }
**Expected Output:** 401 Unauthorized — { "message": "Invalid credentials" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

**UT28 - Login with Non-Existent Email**

Attempts login with an email that has never been registered.

**Test ID:** UT28
**Module Name:** Authentication
**Test Description:** Negative — unregistered email must not reveal account existence (user enumeration prevention)
**Input:** POST /api/auth/login — Body: { email: 'ghost@nowhere.com', password: 'SomePass123' }
**Expected Output:** 401 Unauthorized — { "message": "Invalid credentials" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT29 - OTP Verification with Expired Code

request.description:
**UT29 - OTP Verification with Expired/Wrong Code**

Submits an incorrect OTP code (000000) to the verify-otp endpoint.

**Test ID:** UT29
**Module Name:** Authentication
**Test Description:** Negative — expired or incorrect OTP must be rejected; no account verification should occur
**Input:** POST /api/auth/verify-otp — Body: { email: 'test@test.com', code: '000000' }
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "Invalid or expired OTP" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT30 - Access Protected Route Without Token

request.description:
**UT30 - Access Protected Route Without Authorization Token**

Calls the /api/auth/me profile endpoint with no Authorization header.

**Test ID:** UT30
**Module Name:** Authentication
**Test Description:** Security — missing JWT must block access to protected routes
**Input:** GET /api/auth/me — No Authorization header
**Expected Output:** 401 Unauthorized — { "message": "No token, authorization denied" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT31 - Access Protected Route with Tampered/Invalid JWT

request.description:
**UT31 - Access Protected Route with Tampered JWT**

Sends a structurally valid but cryptographically invalid JWT token.

**Test ID:** UT31
**Module Name:** Authentication / Security
**Test Description:** Security — a tampered token signature must fail JWT verification; no data must be returned
**Input:** GET /api/auth/me — Authorization: Bearer <tampered JWT>
**Expected Output:** 401 Unauthorized — { "message": "Token is not valid" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: 13. Edge Cases & Negative - Doctors Module
item.description: Edge case, negative, and security test cases for the Doctors module (UT32-UT36).

item.name: UT32 - Book Consultation Without Auth Token

request.description:
**UT32 - Book Consultation Without Authorization Token**

Attempts to book a consultation with no Authorization header.

**Test ID:** UT32
**Module Name:** Doctors
**Test Description:** Security — unauthenticated booking attempt must be blocked by auth middleware
**Input:** POST /api/doctors/consultations — No Authorization header, valid body
**Expected Output:** 401 Unauthorized — { "message": "No token, authorization denied" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT33 - Book Consultation with Non-Existent Doctor ID

request.description:
**UT33 - Book Consultation with Non-Existent Doctor ID**

Submits a consultation booking with a doctorId that does not exist in the database.

**Test ID:** UT33
**Module Name:** Doctors
**Test Description:** Negative — booking must fail gracefully if the referenced doctor record is not found
**Input:** POST /api/doctors/consultations — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, doctorId: 999999
**Expected Output:** 404 Not Found — { "message": "Doctor not found" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT34 - Create Prescription with User Role (Should Fail)

request.description:
**UT34 - Create Prescription with Regular User Role (RBAC Test)**

Attempts to create a prescription using a user-level token instead of a doctor token.

**Test ID:** UT34
**Module Name:** Doctors / Security
**Test Description:** Security (RBAC) — only DOCTOR or ADMIN roles may create prescriptions; a USER token must be forbidden
**Input:** POST /api/doctors/prescriptions — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}} (role=USER)
**Expected Output:** 403 Forbidden — { "message": "Access denied. Doctor role required." }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT35 - Doctor Search with No Results (Boundary)

request.description:
**UT35 - Doctor Search Returning Empty Results**

Searches doctors by a specialization that does not exist in the system.

**Test ID:** UT35
**Module Name:** Doctors
**Test Description:** Boundary — search with no matching records must return an empty array, not an error
**Input:** GET /api/doctors?specialization=AlienVet
**Expected Output:** 200 OK — { "doctors": [], "total": 0 }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT36 - Update Consultation Status with Invalid Status Value

request.description:
**UT36 - Update Consultation Status with Invalid Enum Value**

Sends an unrecognised status string to the PATCH status endpoint.

**Test ID:** UT36
**Module Name:** Doctors
**Test Description:** Edge case — invalid enum value must be rejected; status must remain unchanged
**Input:** PATCH /api/doctors/consultations/1/status — Authorization: Bearer {{doctorToken}}, status: 'FLYING'
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "Invalid status value" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: 14. Edge Cases & Negative - Events Module
item.description: Edge / negative test cases for Event listing and registration (UT37-UT38).

request.description:
**UT37 - Event Registration for Non-Existent Event**

Attempts to register for an event ID that does not exist.

**Test ID:** UT37
**Module Name:** Events
**Test Description:** Negative — system must return 404 when the target event is not found; no orphan registration record should be created
**Input:** POST /api/events/register — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, eventId: 999999
**Expected Output:** 404 Not Found — { "message": "Event not found" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT38 - Create Event with User Role (Non-Admin Should Fail)

request.description:
**UT38 - Create Event Without Admin Role (RBAC)**

Attempts to create a new event using a regular user token.

**Test ID:** UT38
**Module Name:** Events / Security
**Test Description:** Security (RBAC) — only ADMIN may create events; USER token must receive 403
**Input:** POST /api/events — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, valid event body
**Expected Output:** 403 Forbidden — { "message": "Access denied. Admin role required." }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: 15. Edge Cases & Negative - Campaigns Module
item.description: Edge / negative test cases for Campaign donation (UT39-UT41).

request.description:
**UT39 - Donation with Zero Amount (Boundary Test)**

Sends a donation request with amount = 0 to verify minimum boundary enforcement.

**Test ID:** UT39
**Module Name:** Campaigns
**Test Description:** Boundary — minimum donation amount must be enforced; zero or negative values should be rejected
**Input:** POST /api/campaigns/1/donate — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, amount: 0
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "Donation amount must be at least 10" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

**UT40 - Donation to Non-Existent Campaign**

Attempts to donate to a campaign ID that does not exist.

**Test ID:** UT40
**Module Name:** Campaigns
**Test Description:** Negative — valid amount against an invalid campaign must return 404; no payment initiation should occur
**Input:** POST /api/campaigns/999999/donate — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, amount: 500
**Expected Output:** 404 Not Found — { "message": "Campaign not found" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT41 - View Campaign with Non-Numeric ID (Injection Edge Case)

request.description:
**UT41 - Campaign Fetch with Non-Numeric/Injection ID**

Sends a non-numeric string as campaign ID to test input sanitization.

**Test ID:** UT41
**Module Name:** Campaigns / Security
**Test Description:** Security / Edge case — non-numeric or injection-style IDs must be rejected without exposing DB errors
**Input:** GET /api/campaigns/abc
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "Invalid campaign ID" } OR 404 Not Found
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: 16. Edge Cases & Negative - Chat Module
item.description: Edge / negative test cases for the Chat System (UT42-UT43).

item.name: UT42 - Initiate Chat Without Auth Token

request.description:
**UT42 - Initiate Chat Session Without Authorization**

Calls chat initiation endpoint with no bearer token.

**Test ID:** UT42
**Module Name:** Chat System
**Test Description:** Security — unauthenticated users must not be able to start chat sessions
**Input:** POST /api/chat/initiate — No Authorization header, petId: 15
**Expected Output:** 401 Unauthorized — { "message": "No token, authorization denied" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT43 - Initiate Chat for Non-Existent Pet

request.description:
**UT43 - Initiate Chat Session for Non-Existent Pet**

Attempts to open a chat room for a pet ID that does not exist.

**Test ID:** UT43
**Module Name:** Chat System
**Test Description:** Negative — chat cannot be initiated for a pet that has no listing or adoption record
**Input:** POST /api/chat/initiate — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, petId: 999999
**Expected Output:** 404 Not Found — { "message": "Pet not found" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: 17. Edge Cases & Negative - Orders Module
item.description: Edge / negative / performance test cases for Orders & Checkout (UT44-UT46).

request.description:
**UT44 - E-Commerce Checkout with Empty Cart**

Attempts to checkout when the user's cart contains zero items.

**Test ID:** UT44
**Module Name:** Orders & Checkout
**Test Description:** Edge case — server must reject checkout if cart is empty; no order record should be created
**Input:** POST /api/orders/checkout — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, paymentMethod: 'COD' (empty cart)
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "Cart is empty" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT45 - Checkout with Invalid Payment Method

request.description:
**UT45 - Checkout with Unsupported Payment Method**

Sends an unrecognised payment method value to the checkout endpoint.

**Test ID:** UT45
**Module Name:** Orders & Checkout
**Test Description:** Edge case — only 'COD' and 'ESEWA' are valid payment methods; any other value must be rejected
**Input:** POST /api/orders/checkout — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, paymentMethod: 'BITCOIN'
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "Invalid payment method" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

**UT46 - Checkout Without Authorization Token**

Calls the checkout endpoint without any JWT bearer token.

**Test ID:** UT46
**Module Name:** Orders & Checkout / Security
**Test Description:** Security — guest users must not be able to place orders; auth middleware must intercept the request
**Input:** POST /api/orders/checkout — No Authorization header
**Expected Output:** 401 Unauthorized — { "message": "No token, authorization denied" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: 18. Edge Cases & Negative - Admin Module
item.description: Security and RBAC test cases for Admin Dashboard (UT47-UT48).

item.name: UT47 - Admin Dashboard with User Token (RBAC)

request.description:
**UT47 - Admin Dashboard Access with User-Level Token (RBAC Test)**

Attempts to fetch admin dashboard statistics using a regular user JWT.

**Test ID:** UT47
**Module Name:** Admin Dashboard / Security
**Test Description:** Security (RBAC) — admin routes must be protected; a USER or DOCTOR token must receive 403
**Input:** GET /api/admin/dashboard-stats — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}} (role=USER)
**Expected Output:** 403 Forbidden — { "message": "Access denied. Admin role required." }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT48 - Admin Approve Doctor with User Token (RBAC)

request.description:
**UT48 - Doctor Approval Request with Non-Admin Token (RBAC)**

Attempts to approve a doctor profile using a regular user token.

**Test ID:** UT48
**Module Name:** Admin Dashboard / Doctors / Security
**Test Description:** Security (RBAC) — doctor approval is an admin-only action; a USER token must be rejected with 403
**Input:** PUT /api/doctors/admin/approve/1 — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}
**Expected Output:** 403 Forbidden — { "message": "Access denied. Admin role required." }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: 19. Edge Cases & Negative - Pets & Adoption Module
item.description: Edge / negative test cases for Pet Listings and Adoption (UT49-UT52).

item.name: UT49 - Create Pet Listing with Missing Required Fields

request.description:
**UT49 - Create Pet Listing with Missing Required Fields**

Submits a pet listing with only the name field; breed, type, age, gender are all omitted.

**Test ID:** UT49
**Module Name:** Pets Listing
**Test Description:** Boundary / Edge case — all required pet fields must be present; partial payload must be rejected
**Input:** POST /api/pets — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, Body: { name: 'Buddy' } only
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "breed, type, age, and gender are required" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT50 - Create Pet Listing with Negative Age (Boundary)

request.description:
**UT50 - Create Pet Listing with Negative Age Value**

Sends a pet age of -1 to test minimum boundary enforcement.

**Test ID:** UT50
**Module Name:** Pets Listing
**Test Description:** Boundary — age must be a non-negative number; values below 0 must be rejected
**Input:** POST /api/pets — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, age: -1
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "Age must be a positive number" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT51 - Submit Adoption Without Auth Token

request.description:
**UT51 - Submit Adoption Application Without Authorization**

Attempts to submit an adoption form with no bearer token.

**Test ID:** UT51
**Module Name:** Adoption System / Security
**Test Description:** Security — unauthenticated adoption submissions must be blocked; only logged-in users may apply
**Input:** POST /api/adoptions — No Authorization header, valid body
**Expected Output:** 401 Unauthorized — { "message": "No token, authorization denied" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: UT52 - Duplicate Adoption Application for Same Pet

request.description:
**UT52 - Duplicate Adoption Application for Same Pet**

Submits a second adoption application for a pet that the same user has already applied for.

**Test ID:** UT52
**Module Name:** Adoption System
**Test Description:** Negative / Business logic — one user should not be able to submit multiple pending adoption applications for the same pet
**Input:** POST /api/adoptions — Authorization: Bearer {{userToken}}, petId: 12 (already applied)
**Expected Output:** 409 Conflict — { "message": "You have already applied to adopt this pet" }
**Result:** Pass / Fail

item.name: 20. Performance & Large Payload Tests
item.description: Performance-related and large-payload unit test scenarios (UT53-UT54).

item.name: UT53 - Registration with Excessively Long Input (Payload Size Boundary)

request.description:
**UT53 - Registration with Excessively Long fullName Field**

Sends a fullName field containing 280+ characters to test maximum length boundary enforcement.

**Test ID:** UT53
**Module Name:** Authentication
**Test Description:** Performance / Boundary — oversized text fields must be capped by validation; the server must reject without crashing or storing truncated data
**Input:** POST /api/auth/register — fullName: 280-character string
**Expected Output:** 400 Bad Request — { "message": "Name must not exceed 100 characters" } (or similar length validation error)
**Result:** Pass / Fail

request.description:
**UT54 - Create Prescription with 20-Item Medications Array (Large Payload)**

Sends a prescription containing 20 medications to test the API's handling of large nested arrays.

**Test ID:** UT54
**Module Name:** Doctors
**Test Description:** Performance — server must process and persist a large medications payload without timeout or data truncation; response time should remain under acceptable thresholds (< 3 seconds)
**Input:** POST /api/doctors/prescriptions — Authorization: Bearer {{doctorToken}}, medications: 20-item array
**Expected Output:** 201 Created — full prescription object with all 20 medications stored; response time < 3000ms
**Result:** Pass / Fail
